rationale: Examples are realistic (meaningful displayName, description, metadata values) and idiomatic per platform with error handling in most snippets, but the page is short — there is only one code block per platform and no import statements, limiting extractability.
suggestions: Add import statements (e.g., `import { UserRepository } from '@amityco/ts-sdk'`) to each platform snippet.
Show a concrete completion handler or callback that confirms the update succeeded, as a production app would typically show a success toast or navigate away.
